basic_details.job_title: RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026 (Out) - Download Here
basic_details.short_information: RRB NTPC Undergraduate (10+2 Level) Admit Card 2026 has been released by Railway Recruitment Boards on 3 May 2026. Candidates who applied for NTPC UG posts under CEN 07/2025 can download their admit card from their respective regional RRB websites or through rrb.digialm.com. The CBT-1 examination is scheduled from 7 May 2026 onwards (7, 8, 9 May and 13 to 21 June 2026) across various centers in India. This hall ticket is mandatory for appearing in the exam. Read below for the direct download link, step-by-step process, exam details, and important instructions for RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 20

important_instructions: Download admit card 2-3 days before your exam date Verify exam center location on Google Maps Plan your route and transportation Carry only allowed items
Reach exam center 60-90 minutes before reporting time Biometric verification (Aadhaar) is mandatory Follow strict dress code and security guidelines No entry after gate closure
seo_tags: RRB NTPC UG Exam Admit Card 2026
